title: Lemon Meringue Tart
excerpt: You can win most people over in a flash with this tart. I won Koos Kombuis over with it. Use a loose-bottomed tart pan – the recipe belongs to Mari-Louis Guy and is a winner.
html:
You can win most people over in a flash with this tart.  I won Koos Kombuis over with it.

Use a loose-bottomed tart pan – the recipe belongs to Mari-Louis Guy and is a winner.

steps: Mix the biscuit crumbs and butter thoroughly and press firmly into a greased tart pan.
Bake for 15 minutes at 170 °C. Set aside to cool.
Mix the condensed milk, juice and zest of 4 lemons in a mixing bowl.
Whisk the egg yolks and cornflour together to a smooth paste and add to the condensed milk mixture until well combined.
Add the 125 ml lemon juice and mix well.
Spoon the lemon mixture into the crust.
Whisk the egg whites to soft peaks and slowly add the castor sugar until stiff peaks form.
Spoon it on top of the lemon mixture.
Bake for 20 minutes at 170 °C until golden brown on top and let it cool completely.
